hero.title: Infrastructure & Networks Specialist · NOC Engineer · DevOps
hero.subtitle: Infrastructure & Networks Specialist · NOC Engineer · DevOps
hero.bio: ISPs, government agencies, and international enterprise projects — 6+ years in infrastructure, networks, and DevOps across completely different environments. From fiber optics and GPON/FTTH to virtualization, servers, and CI/CD, with proven technical leadership. Took part in global-scale projects, including a 30-site mining migration with Accenture. C1 English.
